variants: Heribert Volz is an accomplished craftsman who has attained an Obsidian Smithing Certificate, showcasing his specialized abilities in the field of metalwork. His academic journey was greatly influenced by his mentor, Kylie Larkin, whose expertise played a crucial role in shaping his techniques. Heribert has made significant contributions to the literature in his field, with his research published in the Echo Fern Library. He receives ongoing support for his artistic projects primarily from the Yearling Roots Circle. In addition to his professional endeavors, he actively volunteers as a Citizenship Coach at Polestar Assembly, where he helps community members understand their civic duties.
